methods.name: Add
methods.description: Register an event→handler mapping. DR0=eventGT, DR1=handlerGT. Returns 0=ok, 1=table_full.

methods.name: Remove
methods.description: Unregister an event GT. DR0=eventGT. Returns 0=ok, 1=not_found.

methods.name: Resolve
methods.description: Look up the handler GT for an event GT. DR0=eventGT. Returns handlerGT or 0 if not registered.

methods.name: List
methods.description: Return the count of currently registered event→handler pairs.

methods.name: Methods
methods.description: Return 5 — the count of public methods on this abstraction.

methods.name: FindEvent
methods.description: (private) Linear scan for eventGT in the routing table. Returns slot index or -1.

methods.name: BindEvent
methods.description: (private) Write an eventGT→handlerGT pair into a free slot. Returns 0.

methods.name: UnbindEvent
methods.description: (private) Zero the routing-table entry for an event. Returns 0.

methods.name: AllBoundEvents
methods.description: (private) Count non-zero routing table entries. Returns count.

author: SIPantic
description: Event-to-handler routing table. Maps event Golden Tokens to handler capabilities. Public: Add, Remove, Resolve, List, Methods. Private helpers enforce internal access control (dispatch entry=0).
